name: Cathedral Windows
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and chocolate chips in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat when melted.
3. Add the egg and powdered sugar. Mix well.
4. Add marshmallows. Stir until coated.
5. Turn out onto wax paper and form a roll.
6. When hardened, slice into 30 pieces approximately 1/2 inch in size.
7. Freezes well.
8. Enjoy!
